subject: Fix maven build
commit_message:
Fix maven build

This commit include following changes:
 * most of the testing libs made up to date,
 * jetty updated to v9.4.36 (servlet-api 3.1.0),
 * Dockerfiles updated to use jetty v.9.4.36,
 * refactored tests (removed Decencapsution).

Issue-ID: SDC-3185
Signed-off-by: Jan Malkiewicz <jan.malkiewicz@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ibefa76b6b120d7befbf4e08c9f9463b156e7a6d5

Patch Set 34: Code-Review+1

Thanks, I'd like other committers to have a look at this, 
I see lots of updates but a few tests cases disabled, we are short on coverage on SDC so we need to cover this in a later review for honolulu.

Patch Set 34:

Yes, some tests were disabled indeed, but they are rather uncritical.
I think we can activate them in later (dedicated) commit.

P.S. I observed that the coverage is a bit hypothetical because a lot of tests do not have any assert statement (mostly those were the deprecated Decencapsulation method was used).

Patch Set 34: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

This is HUGE commit mixing a lot of different changes, and it is not best practice

I'd suggest to split in various separate commits:
- upgrade dependencies version
- fix catalog-be
- refactor tests to remove outdated org.jmockit dependency (Deencapsulation)
  see as example https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/sdc/+/117996
- etc...
